__invoking_submit_for_review_from_drafti.description: Synthetic intermediate state for event-invoke on event-invoke-child.yaml

pom.description:
Minimal parent workflow used to demonstrate synchronous invoke-from-event.
A transition declares invoke instead of a direct "to": when the event
fires from the source state, the child workflow runs synchronously.
When the child terminates, the parent jumps to the target declared in
on_completion (one target per child terminal).

events.name: submit_for_review
events.description:
author submits the document; the validation child workflow runs
synchronously to decide the next parent state.
